title: Isolation of Autophagosomes and Proteinase K Protection Assay
author: Elisabeth Holzer
materials: Use this AP-enriched fraction for downstream applications.
Analyze by SDS-PAGE and Western blotting.

steps.title: Use the following cell lines
steps.instruction: Use the following cell lines: HAP1 ATG9A-GFP (RRID:CVCL_E2TR) HAP1 ATG9A-GFP ATG2 DKO (RRID:CVCL_F0LE)

steps.title: Seed cells in 15 cm dishes (two dishes per condition)
steps.instruction: Seed cells in 15 cm dishes (two dishes per condition).

steps.title: Treat cells with
steps.instruction: Treat cells with: Earle’s Balanced Salt Solution (EBSS). 100 nanomolar (nM) Bafilomycin A1 (BafA).

steps.title: Incubate for 02:00:00 prior to harvesting
steps.instruction: Incubate for 02:00:00 prior to harvesting.

steps.title: Harvest cells by trypsinization and pellet via centrifugation
steps.instruction: Harvest cells by trypsinization and pellet via centrifugation.

steps.title: Wash once with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash once with PBS.

steps.title: Resuspend pellets in 800 µL Vesicle Isolation Buffer (VIB)
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellets in 800 µL Vesicle Isolation Buffer (VIB): A B 1 HEPES pH 7.5 20 mM 2 NaCl 150 mM 3 Sucrose 250 mM 4 1× cOmplete™ EDTA-free protease inhibitors (Roche) 5 β-glycerophosphate 20 mM 6 Sodium orthovanadate 1 mM 7 NaF 1 mM 8 EDTA pH 8.0 1 mM

steps.title: Transfer to LoBind tubes (Eppendorf, Cat# 0030108116)
steps.instruction: Transfer to LoBind tubes (Eppendorf, Cat# 0030108116).

steps.title: Lyse cells by passing suspension through a 26G needle 30×
steps.instruction: Lyse cells by passing suspension through a 26G needle 30×.

steps.title: Repeat needle passage another 30×
steps.instruction: Repeat needle passage another 30×.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1000 x g, °C, for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Collect supernatant
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant.

steps.title: Add 700 µL VIB to the...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL VIB to the pellet of the previous step, repeat 1000 x g, °C, spin.

steps.title: Remove residual debris:
steps.instruction: Remove residual debris:

steps.title: Centrifuge pooled supernatants at 2000 x g, °C, for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge pooled supernatants at 2000 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Collect supernatant
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant.

steps.title: Centrifuge supernatant at 10000 x g,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge supernatant at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Collect pellet
steps.instruction: Collect pellet.

steps.title: Wash pellet with 500 µL Wash Buffer (WB)
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with 500 µL Wash Buffer (WB): A B 1 HEPES pH 7.5 20 mM 2 NaCl 150 mM 3 1× cOmplete EDTA-free protease inhibitors

steps.title: Re-pellet at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Re-pellet at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Resuspend final pellet in 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend final pellet in 500 µL WB + 1 mM DTT %s %s

steps.title: Add 10 μg/ml proteinase K (Thermo Scientific, Cat# EO0491)
steps.instruction: Add 10 μg/ml proteinase K (Thermo Scientific, Cat# EO0491).

steps.title: Incubate for 00:20:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Add 1 millimolar (mM) PMSF (Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Cat# sc-482875)
steps.instruction: Add 1 millimolar (mM) PMSF (Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Cat# sc-482875).

steps.title: Incubate On ice for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate On ice for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 15 µL WB...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 15 µL WB %s %s 6× SDS loading buffer
